notes.purpose: Stage 1 CPT on local FineWeb-2 haw_Latn slice. Prototype-only. Not a release artifact.
notes.hardware: Tuned for 1x A100 40GB. bf16 requires Ampere+; A100 qualifies. L40S also viable — confirm bitsandbytes CUDA kernel compat before use.
notes.gate: Requires HF access to meta-llama/Llama-3.1-8B. Run --preflight before spending GPU time.
notes.data: train.jsonl: 95507 rows, FineWeb-2 haw_Latn, deduped, prototype_only=True, release_eligible=False. Off-git under data/stage1/fineweb2_haw/.
notes.eval_data: dev.jsonl: 621 rows, FineWeb-2 haw_Latn dev split, prototype_only=True. Off-git under data/evals/fineweb2_haw/.
notes.path_note: Paths are config-relative (relative to this file's directory). Run from repo root or code/: python -m llm_hawaii.train --config code/configs/stage1_fineweb2_haw.json
notes.resume: If session interrupted: python -m llm_hawaii.train --config code/configs/stage1_fineweb2_haw.json --resume-from-checkpoint runs/llama31-8b-stage1-fw2/checkpoint-NNN
